capacity_cycle_phase_annual: imports declining slower than runs (inventory/build risk)

refinery_utilization.cycle_phase: sharp run-cut phase (utilization well below pre-shock baseline)
refinery_utilization.notes: CDU capacity utilization = crude throughput / nameplate CDU capacity. Independent (地炼) rate is the margin-sensitive teapot segment; megaproject (大炼化) captures integrated coastal complexes (Hengli, Rongsheng, etc.).

eia_refresh.note: Run with EIA_API_KEY=... EIA_FORCE_REFRESH=1 to pull live EIA International data

sources.annual_balance: EIA International Data API v2 (product 57 imports/production; product 53 consumption)
